entry.title: Mass Update of Contact Person - Customer Master Data (XD02)
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I need to add/update a contact person email address (in a dedicated Contact Person Function) at customer master data level (XD02). And this should be done massively.

I tried with an LSMW but there's no way to say to the recording the position that we want to add/update, because it changes from customer to customer and how many "entries" he already have. Most of cases will overwritten the info already existing.

Also checked with XD99 (MASS) transaction but there's only have the option to add the field "email address"

Any other idea how to do it in a "functional" way? Or any FM or BAPI that can be used? 

Kind regards

Joao Pereira

entry.title: Hierarchy ID Not Recognized in Balance Sheet and Income Statement (Multidimensional) App
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,


I have created a Financial Statement Version using the Manage Global Hierarchies app. I added a node named "Income Statement" and placed three Functional Areas below it. I saved and activated the hierarchy.


However, when I go to the Balance Sheet and Income Statement (Multidimensional) app, I do not find the hierarchy ID in the selection options. When I manually enter it, I receive an error message (as shown in the image attached).

What could be the problem, and how can I solve it?

Best regards

entry.title: Inconsistent data between table KBLP and COOI and FMIOI
entry.content:
Please find attached document having screen shots of below mentioned issue we have in our production PS1, Integration QST and QS1 UAT  system. Attached screen shots is from our QST system and it is where first we need a fix before fix in Production

Issue:

We have found some inconsistency between EARMARKED FUNDS (Funds Commitment) table KBLP and  FM commitment documents FMIOI and CO commitment line item table COOI. 

REFX contract 1271/4521776 assigned to funds commitment 7000033525 and you can see in attached document point 4 where REFX contract look ok. The issue is when we see funds commitment 7000033525 via FMZ3 it shows two line item which is also validated via REFX contract as well as in table KBLP. 

However when we run KSB2 commitment item report for cost centers it shows 5 line items in which item item 1 is ok, item 2 has incorrect amount and item 3, 4 and 5 is showing which not exist in FMZ3 and KBLP. 

KSB2 retrieved commitments amount from table COOI which is commitment details table and this table also contain 5 line items with 3 , 4 and 5 not exist in FMZ3

Also FM commitment document table FMIOI is showing 5 items where as item 1 and 2 are correct and 3, 4 and 5 is in this table however they are not in FMZ3 or in KBLP

Following Requests from SAP:

  1. How can we delete or removed incorrect entries from COOI and FMIOI to make sure our free balance reports , KSB2 and all reports showing only two items exactly the way we seeing in tale KBLP and via FMZ3
  2. Also if SAP can highlight what would be the potential causes which have this inconsistency. 

 

As this is just example of one contract and funds commitments however we have issue in multiple contracts and funds commitment so we highly appreciate if SAP can pinpoint some program, OSS note or any fix which delete those inconsistent document for our commitment reports.

entry.title: Intercompany invoices in RE-FX
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Do you know is there an official SAP recommendation (or what is your experience from practice) how to deal with intercompany lease invoices in RE-FX?


Regards

entry.title: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
We want to reverse the posted depreciation for a specific period and we want to stop posting depreciation against that asset in the forthcoming periods. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Reset ANLC to rebuild a depreciation area - S/4 HANA private Cloud
entry.content:
Hey everyone, 

I'm facing the following problem in SAP S/4 HANA private Cloud.

We built a new depreciation area 51 afterward, which was supposed to take over values from depreciation area 01. We ran the AFAR transaction, but haven’t posted any depreciation yet. Unfortunately, during the AFAR process, 18 entries were created in ANEP as acquisitions.

Now, I need to deactivate depreciation area 51 again and remove the values from the assets (ANLC) so that no further calculations are made and everything is clean again.

Does anyone have experience with this?

Best regards.

Marleen

entry.title: Billing Document Posted in Current year, Accounting Document Posted in Previous year
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

Intercompany Billing  Document Posted in current year i.e 2025, where as Accounting document was posted in 2021. We are in ECC 6.0

Please help me what are the settings that need to checked or T.codes which needs to be investiaged . 

All the help will be greatly apprecited.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: NACHA file is creating a new batch 5 record for each payment
Different profit center in sales order, but billing document is blocked.
entry.content:
Dear friends,
If the user is trying to release the billing document, the user gets the error " No posting can be done to profit centr 1000 in company code 2000. we are in ECC 6.0.

However, when i checked the profit center is 1250 and in material master also it is 1250.

only In T.code OkB9, i found the profit center is 1000.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.


Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Problem in OABC
entry.content:
Dear SAP,


Why in OABC is it available to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that is flagged in OADB as “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation”?


<see file attached>


Why it is not possible to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that in OADB as “3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”?


What is  the main difference between option 3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”and “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation” on AA side?


Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How Transaction type (field RMVCT) is filled in ACDOCA within whole Accounting processes GL, AP, AR?
entry.content:
After the Brownfield migration to S4 Hana, the information in the Transaction Type field (RMVCT) is not being recorded in the tables. When trying to map the movements for the Group Reporting implementation, we are not finding the Transaction Type information and therefore we are unable to activate Group Reporting.

How the Transaction type (field RMVCT) is filled in ACDOCA within whole Accounting processes GL, AP, AR, MM, SD, etc.) ?

entry.title: Update GL account on Financial Statement Version defined with Functional Areas
entry.content:
Hi All

Good day

I have a FSV setup with Functional areas. I want to move one GL account  from one Functional Area to other.

Could you please let me know where can I do this?

entry.title: CNAB240 Pagamento Santander
entry.content:
Olá,

pessoal estou configurando o layout de pagamento cnab240 do banco santander, estou com dificuldade em encontrar onde customizar a posição no header 33 a 52

Alguém conhece essa customização?

Obrigada,

entry.title: Po Currency Conversion Issue (S4/H
entry.content:
Good morning everyone, 

we are facing a problem into the FI accounting document arising from a MIGO posting.

We've posted a document via MIGO, that has correctly generated an FI document. Problem is coming here because into this document, conversion is not made at the header exchange rate (coming from OB08, TCURR). Seems to be a rounding issue.

I attach some print to explain my problem in details:

This is the document coming from MIGO. As you can see "General Ledger Amount" is 64.010,00 USD, but the "Amount in Local Currency" is 62.160,00 EUR. If we make a calculation: 64.010,00 / 1,0298 = 62.157,70 EUR.

We suspect that our problem comes out during the PO unit price * quantity 

This is our purchasing order, we have a Unit price of 64,01 USD. If we try to convert this price we have:
64,01 / 1,0298 = 62,15770. This value rounded results in 62,16 that multiplied for 1000 (quantity), comes out as 62.160,00 EUR (value in FI document).

We don't want this rounding before multiplication.

Could please someone could help us? 
Thank you so much

entry.title: Transaction REISBDCT error, Field symbol has not been assigned yet.
entry.content: When I call the transaction "REISBDCT - Fixtures/Fittings for Master Data", I get the error Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

entry.title: Clearing date is missing in selection screen for Tcode S_P00_07000134 (FIORI and Back-end system )
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I need your help,

We have two SAP S4 Hana systems, there is one user who has "clearing date" field  when running the tcode S_P00_07000134 on FIORI on SAP system A :

but I don't have it when I run the same Tcode on the SAP system B and even on the SAP System A : 

 

Any idea please why this difference?

 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Getting error while executing FAGLGVTR
entry.content:
Hii teams 

While performing FAGLGVTR, the following error appears.

Diagnosis

The fiscal year change was not performed for company code 1000 as more than two fiscal years are open in Asset Accounting.

Procedure

First carry out a year-end closing for fiscal year 2023 in company code 1000.

When we checked the FAA_CMP, we are unable to change the “highest fiscal year” to 2025. The field is disabled. Kindly advise as to how to execute FAGLGVRT successfully.

entry.title: How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard FIORI application or Tcode ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts, need your help please!

How can I upload mass vendor invoices, any standard FIORI application or Tcode please ?
I tried "Upload General Journal Entries" but it doesn't work for vendor invoices, if someone can confirm this please ?

I'm wondering if there an other similar FIORI application for vendor invoices or if there is any workaround solution ?

Thank you in advance,

MEDKHA

entry.title: Archiving suggested for JEST Table- need support
entry.content:
Hello Team,

SAP recommended to plan Archiving for JEST table. 

With reference to recommendation on archiving JEST table, we checked and observed that there are many objects present in JEST table which is connected with different modules (like MM, FICO, etc.)
Please suggest: Which objects in JEST table should we consider?

 

Regards,

BASIS Team.

entry.title: Need assistance in transferring the net book value of Fixed asset
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Could you please provide the process for transferring fixed assets to inventory after capitalizing and calculating depreciation for three years? We now need to transfer the net book value (NBV) to inventory.
